seo.title: Mama Mama Mayangadhe Song Lyrics Veera
seo.description: Full Mama Mama Mayangadhe songs lyrics, Veera Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Krishna Kishore, Music: Leon James, Singer(s): Anthonydasan.
seo.keywords: Krishna Kishore, Veera, Leon James, Anthonydasan, Mama Mama Mayangadhe full lyrics, Veera songs lyrics, Mama Mama Mayangadhe lyrics snippets, Mama Mama Mayangadhe WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Mama Mama Mayangadhe lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Mama Mama Mayangadhe conveys a playful and energetic vibe, focusing on enjoying life and love.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Veera, this song captures a lively moment that showcases the protagonist's carefree spirit and charm.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Anthonydasan, known for his energetic performances.

Who composed the music for this track?

The music for Mama Mama Mayangadhe was composed by Leon James, who is recognized for his catchy tunes.

When was this song released?

This vibrant track was released on January 13, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Veera, the song Mama Mama Mayangadhe serves as a lively anthem that encapsulates the carefree and joyous spirit of youth. The upbeat tempo and energetic lyrics invite listeners to celebrate life and love, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. The playful nature of the song evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, encouraging everyone to let loose and enjoy the moment. With Anthonydasan's dynamic vocals and Leon James's catchy composition, this track is sure to leave a lasting impression.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove to the infectious beats of Mama Mama Mayangadhe from the action-packed film Veera. With Anthonydasan's vibrant vocals and Leon James's electrifying music, this track is sure to elevate your spirits. Experience the perfect blend of energy and fun that makes this song a must-listen for any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: Mama, don't let her eat the mango.
Don't get lost in thoughts, don't get distracted.
I had a drink, she had water, and that's the matter.
What I saw was her smile, it changed my life.
Sing with clarity, let it flow, let it be lively.
Sing with clarity, let it flow, let it be lively.
Hey, when I think of her, I get excited, when her father sees her, he gets worried.
When I look at you, I feel love, I think of you as someone special.
When you look at me, I feel love, I remember everything and smile.
Sing with clarity, let it flow, let it be lively.
